rationale: Fresh documentation validation read the corrected documentation build, its source feedback build, and the prior fail report. Accepted REQ-ARCH-001 through REQ-ARCH-009 are documented in the KB; corrected frontmatter code_paths now point only to existing paths; codewiki_state(refresh=true) reports green health; stale public terms are absent from corrected KB documentation outputs except the allowed explicit transitional legacy `claim` note; target architecture remains expressed in body text and diagrams rather than false current-implementation frontmatter.
checks: accepted architecture requirements REQ-ARCH-001..REQ-ARCH-009 traced to .codewiki/kb/system/file-structure.md, overview.md, api.md, adapters.md, compilers.md, validation-gateway.md, graph.md, audits.md, extension.md, control-room-ui.md, .codewiki/kb/lexicon.md, and system diagrams
python frontmatter scan of .codewiki/kb/**/*.md code_paths -> 93 entries, 0 missing paths
stale-term scan of .codewiki/kb/**/*.{md,yaml,yml,mmd} -> 0 exact matches for scripts/check-architecture, Graph state machine, codewiki_claim, Change claim, Claims as nav

claim substring scan -> allowed transitional note only in .codewiki/kb/lexicon.md: Legacy `claim` naming may remain only as a transitional adapter/API alias during migration; unrelated normal word 'claimed' appears in publication row

target-only paths src/ui, src/ui/web, src/application/tools, src/application/compilers, src/application/gateways, src/application/state-engine, src/domain/state -> 0 frontmatter hits; 17 body hits documenting target intent
diagram/body review -> .codewiki/kb/system/file-structure.md target package layout, architecture.mmd/component-map/data-model intent, and current code_paths remain distinct

isolation_requirement.reason: Fresh validation is preferred but not required for this profile.

isolation.notes: Validation rerun consumed only corrected documentation build, source feedback build, prior fail report, KB files, frontmatter scans, stale-term scans, diagram/body docs, and refreshed CodeWiki state.
